action_items.task: Go to the campus tutoring center for math.
Check the campus job board for part-time employment.
action_items.context: Looking for part-time work to earn spending money.

action_items.task: Strictly adhere to the 10:00 PM curfew.
action_items.context: Received a verbal warning for a recent late arrival after a family dinner.

critical_updates.details: Client returned home after 10:00 PM curfew on Saturday following a family dinner. PO issued a verbal warning; no formal violation filed. Client reports no police contact.
Client is a full-time student. Applied for part-time jobs at a nearby coffee shop and bookstore. Plans to look for on-campus employment.
Continues to reside with parents. Uses father's Honda or takes the bus for transportation.
Client reports continued sobriety. Did not consume alcohol at a recent family event.
Attended brother's birthday dinner with parents and brother's family. Client states relationship with parents is fine, though mother worries frequently.

next_episode_context: Client is currently a full-time college student living with his parents. He is maintaining sobriety but received a verbal warning for a minor curfew violation after attending a family dinner. For the next episode, check if he attended math tutoring, applied for on-campus jobs, and maintained his strict 10:00 PM curfew.
